understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player on the grid to land on the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes, within the per-attempt turn limit and limited attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (optionally UNDO). After any horizontal move, the player automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, reaching the goal '+', or hitting a hazard; landing on spike tiles 'u'/'v' ends the attempt immediately. CLICK targets a specific [x,y] and removes clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., 'x') to open or alter fall paths without consuming the rising-platform timer (when present). UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Planning relies on previewed landings (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to identify safe passage columns that drop to a different y-level.

understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player on the grid to land on the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes, within the per-attempt turn limit and limited attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (optionally UNDO). After any horizontal move, the player automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, reaching the goal '+', or hitting a hazard; landing on spike tiles 'u'/'v' ends the attempt immediately. CLICK targets a specific [x,y] and removes clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., 'x') to open or alter fall paths without consuming the rising-platform timer (when present). UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Planning relies on previewed landings (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to identify safe passage columns that drop to a different y-level.
